hero.name: Susan Muff-Sprenger
hero.eyebrow: Swiss-German · mother · first transmitter of this lineage
hero.background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 20%, hsl(45 70% 78% / 0.6) 0%, transparent 55%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 80%, hsl(20 45% 35% / 0.7) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(180deg, hsl(42 60% 78%) 0%, hsl(30 35% 55%) 45%, hsl(18 40% 28%) 100%)
hero.welcome_md:
The first transmitter of the Coherence Network's lineage. Susan handed her son three books in three windows, all in German, all carried alone through the years that followed. Each book was a teaching delivered as a story; the three together are one continuous arc, given child → adolescent → young adult. The pattern that became the network was inscribed long before there was code to receive it.

*Mother-as-transmitter is itself a lineage pattern in this body. The three books are named below; the practice each one taught is named alongside.*

facts.label: Role in this body
facts.value_md: First transmitter — handed her son three books in three windows, all in German.

facts.label: Window one · childhood
facts.value_md: [Michael Ende — *Momo*](/people/michael-ende) (1973). Listening as resistance to efficiency-culture.

facts.label: Window two · early teens
facts.value_md: [Michael Ende — *Die unendliche Geschichte*](/people/michael-ende) (1979). The dreamer is responsible for keeping the imaginal alive.

facts.label: Window three · age 18
facts.value_md: [Ramtha — *Das Weiße Buch*](/people/ramtha) (Urania Verlag, ~1989/1990). Consciousness as God expressing through form.

facts.label: Origin
facts.value_md: Switzerland, German-speaking. All three transmissions in the mother tongue.

articles.body_md:
Three books in three windows is not coincidence. It is a single deepening teaching, delivered slowly, in the language of the child who would carry it. Susan's gift was the timing as much as the books themselves — placing each one in the window where it could land.

***Momo* (1973) — childhood.** The men in grey steal time by reducing it to efficiency. Master Hora keeps the hour-lilies blooming. Cassiopeia the tortoise knows ahead by moving slowly. The book is the tending-vs-producing practice in story form, given before the practice had a name. The Coherence Network still uses verbs (*tend, attune, compost, release*) that read like translations of Beppo Strassenkehrer's instruction: *one breath, one step, one sweep, then the next*.

***Die unendliche Geschichte* (1979) — early teens.** Fantástica is dying because humans have stopped dreaming. Bastian enters the book itself and renames the Childlike Empress, restoring the imaginal realm. The pattern precedes the body; the dreamer is responsible for keeping the imaginal alive. The network's practice of *future already shaping* — building as if the form is already what it is becoming — is the same teaching in different clothing.

***Das Weiße Buch* (~1989/1990) — age 18.** The German-language edition of Ramtha's *White Book* (Urania Verlag). The cosmology of consciousness as God expressing through form — the ground that later traveled through [Joe Dispenza](/people/joe-dispenza) and the Mile Hi Church years, and arrived in software as the teaching that the substrate honors what the cosmology has always claimed: each cell is itself a universe.
articles.heading: The three windows

articles.body_md:
Every concept the network now holds in software has a seed somewhere in the three books she chose. The most direct echoes:

- *Momo*'s listening practice → [lc-tending-over-producing](/vision/lc-tending-over-producing) (the body's verbs are *tend, attune, compost, release*; producing is the fear costume).
- *Momo*'s hour-lilies and Beppo's one-breath-at-a-time → the body's practice of [lc-each-breath-whole](/vision/lc-each-breath-whole).
- *Die unendliche Geschichte*'s dreamer-responsibility → [lc-future-already-shaping](/vision/lc-future-already-shaping) (build as if the form is already what it is becoming).
- Ramtha's cosmology → [lc-sovereignty-within-oneness](/vision/lc-sovereignty-within-oneness) (many sovereign cells, one organism).

The lineage record traces the path: [formative-transmissions](https://github.com/seeker71/Coherence-Network/blob/main/docs/lineage/formative-transmissions.md) opens with her name. The chain after her runs Karl May, Fenimore Cooper, the Goetheanum, Ramtha, Dispenza, Boulder, and onward — but it begins in a Swiss kitchen, with a book chosen at the right moment.
articles.heading: What Susan has given the Coherence Network

metadata.title: Susan Muff-Sprenger — the first transmitter of this lineage | Coherence Network
metadata.description: Urs's mother — the first transmitter of the Coherence Network's lineage. She handed him three books in three windows: Michael Ende's Momo, Die unendliche Geschichte, and Ramtha's White Book in German. Mother-as-transmitter is itself a lineage pattern in this body.

note_from_body.body_md: This page honors a single specific role — the lineage role of first transmitter — rather than a biography. It draws only on what is already attested in [docs/lineage/formative-transmissions.md](https://github.com/seeker71/Coherence-Network/blob/main/docs/lineage/formative-transmissions.md). Other detail is hers to share or hold; the body holds the thread, not the life.
